%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%
%%% LaPreprint-based chapter template (minimal derivation) %%%
%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%%

% Keep LaPreprint structure and options as close as possible.
\documentclass[9pt
[#- if options.venue_footer == "biorxiv" #],biorxiv[# endif -#]
[#- if options.venue_footer == "medrxiv" #],medrxiv[# endif -#]
[#- if options.venue_footer == "arxiv" #],arxiv[# endif -#]
[#- if options.venue_footer == "chemrxiv" #],chemrxiv[# endif -#]
[#- if options.venue_footer == "preprint" #],Preprint[# endif -#]
[#- if options.theme_color == "red" #],red[# endif -#]
[#- if options.line_spacing == "onehalfspacing" #],onehalfspacing[# endif -#]
[#- if options.line_spacing == "doublespacing" #],doublespacing[# endif -#]
[#- if options.line_numbers #],lineno[# endif -#]
[#- if options.number_sections #],secnum[# endif -#]
]{lapreprint}

% Keep package set aligned with lapreprint template.
\usepackage[version=4]{mhchem}
\usepackage{siunitx}
\usepackage{pdflscape}
\usepackage{rotating}
\usepackage{textgreek}
\usepackage{gensymb}
\usepackage[misc]{ifsym}
\usepackage{orcidlink}
\usepackage{listings}
\usepackage{colortbl}
\usepackage{tabularx}
\usepackage{longtable}
\usepackage{subcaption}
\usepackage{multirow}
\usepackage{snotez}
\usepackage{csquotes}
\usepackage{unicode-math}
\usepackage{xcolor}
\usepackage{float}
\floatplacement{table}{htbp}
\usepackage{url,hyperref}
\urlstyle{same}
[-IMPORTS-]
\DeclareSIUnit\Molar{M}

\usepackage[
  backend=biber,
  style=authoryear,
  natbib=true,
  hyperref=true,
  alldates=year,
]{biblatex}
\AtEveryBibitem{%
  \clearfield{urlyear}
  \clearfield{urlmonth}
  \clearlist{language}
}
[# if doc.bibliography #]
\addbibresource{[- doc.bibliography | join(", ") -]}
[# endif #]

% Article metadata (kept from lapreprint pattern)
\title{[-doc.title-]}
[# for author in doc.authors -#]
\author[
  [#- if author.orcid #]\orcidlink{[- author.orcid -]}[# endif -#]
  [-- author.affiliations|join(", ", "index") --]
  [#- if author.corresponding #]\Letter[# endif -#]
]{[-- author.name --]}
[# endfor #]

[# for affiliation in doc.affiliations #]
\affil[[-affiliation.index-]]{[-affiliation.value.name-]}
[# endfor #]

[# for author in doc.authors #]
[# if author.corresponding #]
\metadata[]{\Letter\hspace{.5ex} For correspondence}{[- author.email -]}
[# endif #]
[# endfor #]

% Added chapter editorial metadata (minimal additions only)
[# if parts.problematic #]
\metadata[]{Problématique}{[-parts.problematic-]}
[# endif #]
[# if parts.literature_note #]
\metadata[]{Littérature mobilisée}{[-parts.literature_note-]}
[# endif #]
[# if doc.keywords #]
\metadata[]{Keywords}{[-doc.keywords|join("; ")-]}
[# endif #]
[# if parts.partial_conclusion #]
\metadata[]{Conclusion partielle}{[-parts.partial_conclusion-]}
[# endif #]

[# if doc.authors -#]
\leadauthor{[- doc.authors[0].name -]}
[#- endif #]
[# if doc.short_title -#]
\shorttitle{[- doc.short_title -]}
[#- else #]
\shorttitle{[- doc.title -]}
[#- endif #]

\begin{document}
\maketitle

[# if parts.abstract #]
\begin{abstract}
[-parts.abstract-]
\end{abstract}
[# endif #]

[-CONTENT-]

\printbibliography

[# if parts.appendix #]
\begin{appendix}
\begin{appendixbox}
[-parts.appendix-]
\end{appendixbox}
\end{appendix}
[# endif #]

\end{document}
